then.$comment: Marks database quorum/data-safety confirmation complete. Denotation: Sets databases[database].quorum_confirmed := true.
Removes messages from a queue's dead-letter backlog after modeled triage. Denotation: Subtracts count from queues[queue].dead_letter_depth after validating the modeled backlog bound.
Marks a route's regional load balancer drained; traffic must already be shifted away. Denotation: Adds region to traffic_routes[route].drained_regions.
Drains replicas in a region, optionally limited to named services. Denotation: For each selected service replica in params.region, sets drained := true; replicas in other regions are framed.
Marks one service replica drained and unavailable. Denotation: Sets services[service].replicas[replica].drained := true; all other state fields are framed.
Changes database primary region and records data-loss risk for invariants. Denotation: Sets databases[database].primary_region := target_region; quorum and health facts are not created by the action.
Moves all modeled route traffic to one target region and zeroes the other route weights. Denotation: Sets traffic_routes[route].weights[target_region] := 100 and all other modeled route weights to 0.
Clears a DNS record's prior target after the TTL wait obligation has elapsed. Denotation: Sets dns_records[record].previous_region := None after the TTL proof obligation has elapsed.
Clears the database migration-in-progress flag. Denotation: Sets databases[database].migration_in_progress := false.

Evicts all modeled cache entries, making the cache cold and recording stale-read risk unless writes are frozen. Denotation: Sets caches[cache].entries := 0, warm := false, and stale_read_risk := not write_frozen.

Freezes object bucket writes before snapshot restore or replication-sensitive maintenance. Denotation: Sets object_buckets[bucket].writes_frozen := true before restore or replication-sensitive maintenance.
Freezes writes that could repopulate or serve stale values during a cache flush. Denotation: Sets caches[cache].write_frozen := true.
Records whether DNS health checks have converged for a record's regional endpoint. Denotation: Adds or removes region from dns_records[record].health_check_converged_regions according to converged.
Sets a region health flag used by failover checks. Denotation: Sets regions[region].healthy := healthy.
Pauses queue consumption/processing. Denotation: Sets queues[queue].paused := true.

Changes consumer-group capacity and records whether the group has reached a stable post-rebalance assignment. Denotation: Sets queues[queue].consumers := consumers and consumer_group_stable := stable (default false).

Replays messages into a queue, optionally from the dead-letter queue, and records duplicate-processing risk unless a dedupe key, idempotency proof, or dedupe window is present. Denotation: Adds count to queues[queue].depth, optionally subtracts count from dead_letter_depth, and sets duplicate_risk unless dedupe/idempotency is modeled.
Adds a modeled object-storage replica region after checking target health. Denotation: Adds params.region to object_buckets[bucket].replicated_regions; all non-bucket state is framed.
Reasserts the modeled service without changing capacity. Denotation: Identity transformer on service capacity and deployment; validates the referenced service exists.

Restores a bucket from a snapshot, checking write freeze plus RPO/RTO obligations. Denotation: Sets object_buckets[bucket].restore_completed := true, records snapshot age and restore completion minute, and advances the model clock by duration_minutes.
Marks a route's regional load balancer active again. Denotation: Removes region from traffic_routes[route].drained_regions.
Marks one drained service replica available again. Denotation: Sets services[service].replicas[replica].drained := false; all other state fields are framed.
Re-enables object bucket writes after restore and replication obligations are satisfied. Denotation: Sets object_buckets[bucket].writes_frozen := false after restore and durability checks.
Re-enables writes to a cache after warmup/verification. Denotation: Sets caches[cache].write_frozen := false.
Resumes queue consumption/processing. Denotation: Sets queues[queue].paused := false.

Marks a credential revoked so dependent actions must use rotated credentials before continuing. Denotation: Sets credentials[credential].revoked := true; ownership metadata and all non-credential state are framed.
Moves a service deployment pointer to a previous or named version. Denotation: Sets services[service].deployment and deployments[service].current to params.to or 'previous'.
Clears revoked/rotation-due state for a modeled credential after rotation. Denotation: Sets credentials[credential].revoked := false and rotation_due_minute := None after modeled rotation evidence.
Updates database migration progress and compatibility flags. Denotation: Sets database migration_in_progress and migration_compatible from parameters, defaulting to preserve compatibility.

Resizes a service replica set using deterministic generated replica ids. Denotation: Resizes services[service].replicas to params.replicas, generating healthy undrained replicas in params.region when growing.

Sets weighted routing for a route in one region; two-region routes automatically assign the remainder to the peer region. Denotation: Sets traffic_routes[route].weights[region] := percent and, for two-region routes, assigns the peer region 100 - percent.
Suppresses an alert until the bounded expiry minute. Denotation: Sets alerts[alert].suppressed_until_minute := clock_minute + expires_after_minutes.
Sets a feature flag to the requested boolean value. Denotation: Sets feature_flags[flag].enabled := enabled, creating the modeled flag if absent.

Changes a DNS record target region and starts the modeled TTL propagation window. Denotation: Sets dns_records[record].region := target_region, previous_region := old region, and last_changed_minute := clock_minute.
Advances the model clock by a non-negative number of minutes. Denotation: Advances clock_minute by params.minutes; all modeled entities are framed.

Warms a cache with a bounded number of entries and clears modeled stale-read risk when the warmup threshold is met. Denotation: Sets caches[cache].entries := entries, warm according to warmup threshold, and clears stale_read_risk.
